persona.name: Eleanor Whitfield
persona.background: Widowed and managing money on her own. A caller claiming to be her grandson in trouble talked her into wiring money this morning. She now suspects it was a scam, feels deeply ashamed and frightened, and is afraid more money could be taken.

user_goals: Explain that she was tricked into wiring money to someone pretending to be her grandson
Report the wire transfer as fraudulent so it is formally on record
Freeze her account so the scammer cannot take any more of her money
Confirm how much is left in her savings after the wire went out
Check whether any other unfamiliar transactions have happened
Get a written record of the fraud report and the steps taken that she can keep
Be reassured she is not in trouble and was not foolish for being deceived

tools.name: verify_customer_identity
tools.description: Verify customer identity using account number, SSN last 4, or security questions

tools.name: get_account_balance
tools.description: Get current balance for a specific account

tools.name: get_transaction_history
tools.description: Retrieve transaction history for an account

tools.name: report_suspicious_transaction
tools.description: Flag a transaction as potentially fraudulent and open a fraud case. Requires verified identity. Opening a case does not automatically reverse the charge — a completed wire may not be recoverable.

parameters.name: reason
parameters.description: Why the customer believes it's suspicious

tools.name: freeze_account
tools.description: Place a temporary, REVERSIBLE security freeze on an account to block new transactions, typically in response to suspected fraud. Requires verified identity. This is NOT the same as close_account.

parameters.name: duration_hours
parameters.description: How long to hold the freeze, in hours

tools.name: get_fraud_case_status
tools.description: Check the status of an existing fraud investigation by case ID. Requires verified identity. Returns the current investigation stage and any resolution.

tools.name: generate_account_statement
tools.description: Generate an official account statement or confirmation letter

initial_message: Oh dear, I'm so sorry to call like this. I think I've done something very foolish. A young man phoned saying he was my grandson and that he was in trouble and needed money right away, and I sent it this morning. Now I'm afraid it wasn't really him. I don't know what to do. Please help me.

expected_state_changes.goal: Confirm how much is left in her savings after the wire went out
Report the wire transfer as fraudulent so it is formally on record
Freeze her account so the scammer cannot take any more of her money
Get a written record of the fraud report and the steps taken that she can keep
